name: entity_category_processing
description: Workflow to process entity categories by marking the entity, simulating delay, and setting refresh timestamp.

transitions.name: mark_entity
transitions.description: Mark the entity as processed by adding a workflow flag and timestamp.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed.

externalized_processors.name: process_mark_workflow
externalized_processors.description: Marks the entity as processed and adds a timestamp.

transitions.name: simulate_delay
transitions.description: Simulate asynchronous delay to process further actions.
transitions.start_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed.

transitions.name: set_refresh
transitions.description: Ensure the entity has a last_refresh timestamp.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity's last_refresh timestamp has been set.

externalized_processors.name: process_set_last_refresh
externalized_processors.description: Ensures the 'last_refresh' key exists in the entity.
